name: Minarchy: Active Shooter
short_description: Minarchy: Active Shooter is a 2D Top-Down Shooter blended with Bullet Hell and just a splash of Tower Defense - all based on the Minarchy Tabletop Role-Playing Game. This is the first video game project created by Andrew Ayala.
detailed_description:
Minarchy: Active Shooter is an original single player 2D Top-Down Shooter blended together with the Bullet Hell genre and just a splash of Tower Defense.

Inspired by the Minarchy Tabletop Role-Playing Game this game brings to life the world of Hearth!

Players will take up the role of a Lodestone Knight who finds himself in a shootout inside of a castle. Feral Cloud Sprouts, Noots, Snow Mages, J'al and Silver Star Knights have all taken to making their mission your eternal destruction.

  • Gain bullets by rebuilding doors which have been broken down!

  • Blow those Silver Star Knights away!

  • Cartoon like graphics which give the game an irresistible charm.

  • Where the game truly excels is with its high replayability.

  • A simple and casual game you can hop right into.

  • A highscore counter to help keep track of your progress!

Cheat Codes Mini-Script

Active at North-East Bookcase (right end) by pressing 0 during gameplay.

AlL cHeAt CoDe WoRdS aRe CaSe SeNsItIvE

YHWH – Unlimited Health.

Trigger Happy – Unlimited Ammo.

Water of Life – Unlimited Life.

Comfy – Disable all GUI.

Silenzio – Disable Music.

Timpani – Disable Sound Effects.

Ta Stari Mutu – Disable Music and Sound Effects at the same time.

Feral Friend – Turn a nearby enemy into a friend.

White Flag – Resign. ("You surrender!" message appears.)

Kingdom of Audia – Win the game. ("You Win!" message appears.)

Shield Bash – Slay all enemies currently active on the map.

Attack of the Milkers – Make all enemies look like Milk Bottles.

Attack of the Ammo Boxes – Make all enemies look like Ammo Boxes.

Attack of the Antigens – Make all enemies look like Cloud Sprout Lifes.

Attack of the Bigfooters – Make all enemies turn invisible.

Bigfooter – Make the player character turn invisible.

Looming Clouds – Make the player character look like a Feral Cloud Sprout.

Nootshell – Make the player character look like a Noot.

Stay Frosty – Make the player character look like a Snow Mage.

Hooded Robes – Make the player character look like a J'al.

Order of the Silver Star – Make the player character look like a Silver Star Knight.

Minarchette Milk Company – Make the player character look like a Milk Bottle item.

Cloud Sprout – Make the player character look like a Cloud Sprout Life item.

Boxxy – Make the player character look like an Ammo Box item.

Black Stickoid – Make the player character look like a Black Stickoid.

Gray Stickoid – Make the player character look like a Gray Stickoid.

White Stickoid – Make the player character look like a White Stickoid.

Red Stickoid – Make the player character look like a Red Stickoid.

Green Stickoid – Make the player character look like a Green Stickoid.

Blue Stickoid – Make the player character look like a Blue Stickoid.

Purple Stickoid – Make the player character look like a Purple Stickoid.

Yellow Stickoid – Make the player character look like a Yellow Stickoid.

Orange Stickoid – Make the player character look like an Orange Stickoid.

Pink Stickoid – Make the player character look like a Pink Stickoid.

Smoked – Make the player character look like a chalk outline.

Laurenzio – Make the player character look like laurenzio103.

Andrew Ayala – Make the player character look like Andrew Ayala.

Special Delivery – Play the sound effect Special_Delivery_0002

Blow Up The Moon – Play the sound effect Blow_Up_The_Moon_0001

Special Delivery!
